prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科（物理类）最低位次分别为约 5066→2639→1277→841→639 名，呈持续大幅上升趋势（位次数字减小），近 4 年累计前移约 4427 名；但 2024→2025 年仅前移 202 名，升幅明显收窄，表明竞争已趋于高位稳态；2021–2023 年理科计划均为 47 人，2024 年降至 42 人，2025 年物理类计划 43 人；2026 年物理类计划 39 人，较 2025 年缩招 4 人（约 -9.3%），缩招将加剧竞争，推高位次数字。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜排名近年稳定在第 21–25 名（2026 年 23 名），属全国顶尖工科院校，对高分考生吸引力持续强劲；2026 年声誉评价偏负面（校园安全事件），抖音热度总排名第 74 位（评价「一般」），无明显正面热度助推；近年未见投档断档记录，声誉影响有限；航空宇航科学与技术 A+、材料科学与工程 A+、计算机科学与技术 A+、机械工程 A、控制科学与工程 A- 等，工科实力极强，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业 2026 年社会热度为「高热推荐」或「推荐」；内蒙古 2026 年普通高考总人数约 15.4 万，按近年物理类占比约 72% 估算，物理类考生约 11.1 万，较 2025 年物理类 8.37 万增加约 32%，竞争显著加剧；西北工业大学位于陕西西安，非本省高校；该校在内蒙古招生占比约 1.3%–1.9%，属外省招生常规比例，无明显地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次已进入高位窄幅波动区间（639 名附近）、2026 年缩招 4 人（-9.3%）、内蒙古物理类考生大幅增加约 32% 等关键因素，竞争加剧将推高位次数字；但学校顶尖工科实力与高热度专业仍吸引高分考生，形成对冲。，考虑考生规模激增与缩招叠加效应，小幅上调 30 名；预测 2026 年最低位次约633名，区间538–728名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次在 633 名附近、区间 538–728 名。位次优于区间上限（≤538 名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（黄玉珊航空班、智慧三航拔尖班、计算机类）；位次在区间中部（约 633 名）建议以二档为主（电子信息类、航空航天类大类）；位次接近区间下限（约 728 名）可考虑三档专业保底。该校工科实力顶尖，航空航天与计算机类社会热度极高，竞争激烈，建议合理梯度填报。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 5066→2639→1277→841→639, showing a continuous and significant upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative advance of about 4427 places over the past 4 years; however, from 2024 to 2025, it only advanced by 202 places, indicating a narrowing increase and suggesting that competition has reached a high-level stable state; from 2021 to 2023, the science enrollment plan was 47 people each year, dropping to 42 in 2024, and 43 in 2025 for the physics category; the 2026 physics category plan is 39 people, a reduction of 4 people (about -9.3%) compared to 2025, which will intensify competition and push ranking numbers higher.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the main ranking of Soft Science has been stable at 21st–25th in recent years (23rd in 2026), making it a top national engineering university, with sustained strong appeal to high-scoring students; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (campus safety incidents), with a total Douyin popularity ranking of 74th (evaluation 'average'), without significant positive popularity boost; no record of admission gaps in recent years, with limited reputation impact; Aeronautical and Astronautical Science and Technology A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A+, Mechanical Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A-, etc., with extremely strong engineering capabilities, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have a 2026 social popularity rating of 'highly recommended' or 'recommended'; the total number of general college entrance exam takers in Inner Mongolia in 2026 is about 154,000, with an estimated physics category proportion of about 72% in recent years, resulting in about 111,000 physics category candidates, an increase of about 32% compared to 83,700 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, not a local university; its enrollment proportion in Inner Mongolia is about 1.3%–1.9%, a normal proportion for out-of-province enrollment, with no significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering key factors such as historical rankings entering a high-level narrow fluctuation range (around 639), a reduction of 4 students in 2026 (-9.3%), and a significant increase of about 32% in Inner Mongolia physics category candidates, intensified competition will push ranking numbers higher; however, the university's top engineering strength and highly popular majors still attract high-scoring students, creating a counterbalance. Considering the combined effect of a surge in candidate numbers and enrollment reduction, a slight upward adjustment of 30 places is made; the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 633, with a range of 538–728.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is around 633, with a range of 538–728. Candidates with rankings better than the upper limit (≤538) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Huang Yushan Aviation Class, Smart Three-Aerospace Top Talent Class, Computer Class); those with rankings in the middle of the range (around 633) are advised to mainly consider Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information Class, Aerospace Class); candidates with rankings near the lower limit (around 728) can consider Tier 3 majors as a safety net. The university has top-tier engineering strength, and majors like Aerospace and Computer Science have extremely high social popularity, leading to intense competition. It is recommended to fill in the application with a reasonable gradient.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 782 → 2400 → 570 → 698 → 447, with significant fluctuations; after a sharp rise to 570 in 2023, it further rose to 447 in 2025 (historical best), showing a forward trend in the last 2 years; from 2021 to 2023, the liberal arts plan was 2 students each year, increased to 7 in 2024, and 6 in 2025 for history category; the 2026 history category plan is 6 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 23rd on the Soft Science main list, very high level, with brand appeal to liberal arts candidates as well; reputation in 2026 is slightly negative (campus safety incident), but the liberal arts enrollment majors are few and not the main focus of the university, so the impact is limited; Douyin popularity is average, with no record of application gaps; the liberal arts enrollment majors (Economics and Trade, Business Administration) correspond to first-level disciplines of Applied Economics and Business Administration, with no A-class discipline evaluations at this university, indicating liberal arts are not its strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of Economics and Trade and Business Administration is 'differentiated and wait-and-see'; Inner Mongolia's 2026 history category candidates, estimated at about 28% of total, approximately 43,000, an increase of about 33% from 32,600 in 2025, intensifying competition; Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Shaanxi, not a local university; the number of liberal arts enrollment is very small (6 students), which is routine for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as large historical ranking fluctuations but a recent forward trend, unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, and a significant increase of about 33% in history category candidates, intensified competition will push ranking numbers higher; however, liberal arts are not the university's strength and enrollment is very small, so rankings are easily affected by a few high-scoring candidates. Considering the surge in candidate numbers, a slight upward adjustment of 20 places; predicted 2026 minimum ranking of approximately 467, with a range of 397–537.
